nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 尼科亚半岛
nodes.summary: 尼科亚半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括小灰頭稚冠雉、Ivory-billed woodcreeper、Rufous-backed wren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 小灰頭稚冠雉
nodes.summary: 小灰頭稚冠雉（Plain chachalaca，学名 Ortalis vetula），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入凤冠雉科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、热带雨林。

nodes.name: 雨季
nodes.summary: 雨季是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括小灰頭稚冠雉、Long-toed lapwing、錘頭鸛等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: 凤冠雉科
nodes.summary: 凤冠雉科（Cracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联56种鸟类，如山冠雉、Black guan、Sickle-winged guan等56种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lower Rio Grande Valley
nodes.summary: Lower Rio Grande Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、小灰頭稚冠雉、Hook-billed kite等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in tropical and subtropical environments from mezquital thickets in the Rio Grande Valley in southernmost Texas, United States to northernmost Costa Rica

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Central America, this species occurs in the Pacific lowlands from Chiapas, Mexico to northern Nicaragua and as a separate population in Costa Rica, where its range is separated by a short distance, as a disjunct population

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The plain chachalaca typically breeds in the early wet season

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Plain chachalacas can often be found in low scrubland The plain chachalaca is found from Texas, in the Lower Rio Grande, through the eastern coast of Mexico, the Yucatán Peninsula, Belize, northern Guatemala, northern Honduras and just into the north central part of Nicaragua, with a small population on the Nicoya Peninsula of northern Costa Rica

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|Plain chachalacas can often be found in low scrubland The plain chachalaca is found from Texas, in the Lower Rio Grande, through the eastern coast of Mexico, the Yucatán Peninsula, Belize, northern Guatemala, northern Honduras and just into the north central part of Nicaragua, with a small population on the Nicoya Peninsula of northern Costa Rica

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The plain chachalaca occupies a wide range of habitats, including primary forest, secondary forest, forest edge and riverine forest, thorny bush-scrub, and shrubland. It is also found in human modified habitats such as orchards, suburban parks and gardens and croplands. Unlike other cracids, it is able to adapt to the scrubland that arises after the clearing of tropical rainforest
